feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: A period of heavy rain. Rainfall amounts may approach warning criteria. Low risk of both thunderstorms and localised downpours with rainfall rates up to to 35 mm/h. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Low. Changes: Chance of upgrade to a Warning has been reduced to low. Risk of thunderstorms also reduced to low.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
